name: @ecology91/skills
description: opencode agent skills for real engineering workflows.

scripts.typecheck: node --check bin/install.mjs && node --check bin/collect-skills.mjs && node --check bin/prompt-skills.mjs && node --check bin/resolve-selection.mjs && node --check bin/resolve-selection.test.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-package-files.mjs
scripts.validate:fast: npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.validate: npm run validate:fast && npm run build
